samples.xml_description:
<module id="parallel2serial">
    <description>Parallel to serial converter, converts every 4 parallel bits to a serial bit output (MSB first).</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal.</input>
        <input id="d" width_description="[3:0]">4-bit parallel data input.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Valid signal indicating the availability of serial output.</output>
        <output id="dout">Serial output representing the converted data.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Every 4 parallel bits are converted to a serial bit output (MSB first).</implementation>
</module>
